name: I didn't go to doctor right after work slip, symptoms worse now, too late?

mainEntity.name: I didn't go to doctor right after work slip, symptoms worse now, too late?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, report within 180 days; delayed symptoms ok if work-related.[1][2] Key factors: Link to incident via doctor report.[1] Document timeline; get imaging.[2] Early claim prevents denials.[1] Treatment still covered.[2]
